name: genesis
description: genesis_sdlc — GTL-based SDLC methodology installer. 5 commands: gen-start (state machine), gen-iterate (single edge), gen-gaps (convergence state), gen-review (F_H gate), gen-status (workspace read). V1: bootstrap SDLC graph (intent→req→feat→design→code↔tests), F_D/F_P/F_H evaluators, human proxy mode.
